2026-04-20T16:37:54.2683351Z [36;1m# Derive GH_HOST from GITHUB_SERVER_URL so the gh CLI targets the correct[0m
2026-04-20T16:37:54.2684274Z [36;1m# GitHub instance (GHES/GHEC). On github.com this is a harmless no-op.[0m
2026-04-20T16:37:54.2685032Z [36;1mGH_HOST="${GITHUB_SERVER_URL#https://}"[0m
2026-04-20T16:37:54.2685616Z [36;1mGH_HOST="${GH_HOST#http://}"[0m
2026-04-20T16:37:54.2686190Z [36;1mecho "GH_HOST=${GH_HOST}" >> "$GITHUB_ENV"[0m
